articles.headline: Iran in Freefall: Day 5 of Bombardment Leaves a Nation Without a Leader
articles.subheadline: The killing of Supreme Leader Khamenei has created an unprecedented power vacuum as Operation Epic Fury dismantles Iran's military infrastructure
